name: Lhong Ngao Jun
original_name: หลงเงาจันทร์
overview: Niti, a handsome young man, heir to a famous department store, was forced by his father, Mr. Phong, to marry Thip Apa, even though Niti already had a lover, Passorn, but with a different status. His father therefore did not allow it, although Khun Aree, his mother, sympathized with it.

trailers.title: หลงเงาจันทร์ [Official Teaser]
